description: Create a wireframe mockup for a 'HealthConnect Patient Portal' login page. The design must include a header with the text 'HealthConnect Patient Portal', a labeled 'Username' or 'Email' input field, a labeled 'Password' input field, a 'Sign In' button, a 'Remember Me' checkbox, a 'Forgot Password?' link, and a footer with the text '© 2024 HealthConnect Medical Group'. Arrange these elements in a clean, vertical login form layout. Save the diagram as '/home/ga/Diagrams/patient_portal_wireframe.eddx' and export it as a PNG image to '/home/ga/Diagrams/patient_portal_wireframe.png'.
